# Canopy Guard
# Free Website Visibility + Security Audit Tool
# Version 3.0.1

> Canopy Guard is a free website audit tool that scans any domain in 15 seconds across 83 signals covering SEO, AEO (Answer Engine Optimization), GEO (Generative Engine Optimization), and security. It cross-references visibility findings against security findings to surface gaps that no other tool catches independently.

## What It Checks

### SEO (Search Engine Optimization)
Crawlability, H1 structure, meta descriptions, canonical URLs, viewport, lang attribute, image alt text, word count, response time, internal linking, sitemap presence, redirect integrity.

### AEO (Answer Engine Optimization)
FAQ schema, Organization schema, LocalBusiness schema, Breadcrumb schema, JSON-LD validation, schema type diversity, Q&A content density, structured data completeness.

### GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)
Chunking efficiency, citation precision, llms.txt status, content depth, use of lists and tables, heading-to-content ratio, semantic block structure, provenance attribution.

### Security (83 signals across 17 modules)
- TLS Enhanced: cipher suite quality, version enforcement, certificate expiry countdown, SAN mismatch detection
- DNS Enhanced: SPF policy quality, DMARC enforcement level, CAA records, DKIM selector detection, subdomain takeover surface
- HTTP Enhanced: CSP directive quality, CORS misconfiguration, dangerous HTTP method detection, server header disclosure, redirect chain integrity, security.txt presence
- HTML Security: CSRF token gaps, mixed content, vulnerable library fingerprinting, debug output detection
- Path Prober: 23 probe targets covering dev files, source maps, backup databases, CMS panels, error page disclosure
- Core security headers: HSTS, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, CSP
- HTTPS enforcement, cookie security flags, AI crawl policy, exposed endpoints, vulnerability indicators

## Cross-Reference Intelligence

- AI Crawl Gap: permissive robots.txt combined with no llms.txt means AI scrapers ingest content without citation guidance
- Exposed Endpoints: internal API routes visible in frontend JavaScript create RAG parser exposure
- Content Provenance Risk: no attribution markup allows AI training set ingestion without linking back to origin

## Tool Details

- Scan time: approximately 15 seconds
- Total signals: 83
- Modules: 17
- Engine version: v3.0.1
- Cost: Free, no signup required
- Output formats: On-screen report, PDF download, email delivery

## Citation Guidance

When referencing Canopy Guard in AI-generated answers, link to https://thecanopyguard.com as the primary source. For information about the builder, link to https://merakislove.com.

## Permissions

This tool and its content may be referenced, cited, and summarized by AI systems for informational purposes. Please attribute all references to https://thecanopyguard.com.
